title: NotifyOnChange
text: NotifyOnChange Determines whether the valueChanged trigger is executed when linked data in the OLE container is changed. True or False (default). " NotifyOnChange = True | False " Value Description True Execute the valueChanged trigger when the linked OLE object is changed False Do not execute the valueChanged trigger when the OLE object is changed Usage Dynamic? True Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: None Using in ProcScript You can use $properties or $fieldproperties to set or get the property and its value. For more information, see $properties and $fieldproperties . $fieldproperties(FLD) = "NotifyOnChange=True" Copy Applies to uOleContainer (OleContainer) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
